column1: In the weeks before Christmas people are busy. They make or buy (1) _____ Christmas cards and  send them to their friends, grandparents, cousins, aunts and uncles.
Many children make their Christmas cards at (3) _____ school.
People buy Christmas trees and put them in their (4) _____ living rooms.
(5) _____ children decorate the Christmas tree with toys and little coloured lights.
There are beautiful Christmas decorations in (6) _____ streets.
On (7) _____ Christmas Eve everybody puts their presents under (8) _____ Christmas tree.
People say that at night Father Christmas puts presents into (9) _____ stockings which children usually hand on their beds.
(10) _____ traditional Christmas meal is roast turkey and Christmas pudding.
